action.reasoning: Observation: MLP v3 got val IC=0.0281 at epoch 57 (best val IC so far). LightGBM v3 got val IC=0.0236. Ridge got val IC=0.0211. Ensemble (LGB+Ridge) got val IC=0.0255. Previous iteration took 67 minutes. Analysis: MLP v3 has the best validation IC. I should submit it for evaluation. Also, I need to try an ensemble approach combining MLP v3 + LightGBM v3 + Ridge which should generalize better. The predict.py needs to support ensemble mode. Let me first submit MLP v3, then create an ensemble checkpoint. Decision: Submit MLP v3 for evaluation, and also create an ensemble predict script that combines all models.
